x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business rules on incident and task tables can intercept or modify Now Assist API calls, causing unexpected behavior. Customer-created rules must be reviewed before enablement to prevent conflicts.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review customer-created Business Rules on incident and task. Test each in sub-production with Now Assist enabled. Disable or modify rules that intercept Now Assist API calls. Target: <50 custom active BRs on incident/task.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c22
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Business rules on incident and task tables can intercept or modify Now Assist API calls, causing unexpected behavior. Customer-created rules must be reviewed before enablement to prevent conflicts.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Business Rules on Incident / Task</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    ga.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'incident,task');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom active Business Rules on incident/task';

    if (count < 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low Business Rule customization on incident/task (' + count + ' custom BRs). Now Assist and AI Agent operations are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count < 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom Business Rules on incident/task. Moderate customization — test Now Assist and AI Agents in sub-production to identify conflicts before go-live.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom Business Rules on incident/task. High customization density creates significant risk of Now Assist and AI Agent conflicts — review and reduce before enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005954</number>
<order>150</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review customer-created Business Rules on incident and task. Test each in sub-production with Now Assist enabled. Disable or modify rules that intercept Now Assist API calls. Target: <50 custom active BRs on incident/task.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c22</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
